## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / build / chore

## Related issues

<!-- Link any related issues, e.g. "Fixes #123" or "Refs #456". -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify your changes? Include commands, sample inputs/outputs, or screenshots if helpful. -->

- [ ] Added or updated unit tests
- [ ] Ran the full test suite locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Manually tested the affected code paths

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation as needed
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] I agree to follow this project's [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
